items.headline: Does Albemarle Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB well-positioned for long-term lithium demand growth. ESS production up 117% YoY in Q1 2026. Zacks 2026 EPS consensus $12.39, implying ~1668% YoY growth. 50-day SMA below 200-day after golden cross in Sep 2025.

items.headline: Albemarle vs Rio Tinto: Which Lithium Stock Holds More Promise?
items.snippet: ALB favored for long-term lithium demand growth. Lithium prices rebounded from 2025 lows on tightening supply and strong China demand. ESS/EV demand CAGR 10-20% through 2030.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC Capital Markets reiterated outperform rating on ALB and boosted price target to $257 per share. Lithium supply expected to remain tight through 2027. 2026E EBITDA $2.8B, 2027E $2.9B.

items.headline: Albemarle ALB Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
items.snippet: Q1 net sales increased 70% YoY. Adjusted EBITDA nearly tripled due to higher pricing and volumes. Maintaining full-year 2026 outlook. On track to deliver $100M-$150M productivity improvements.
